utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 of these items. Each item is fully specified: health_coverage includes both physical and mental health details with costs; property_coverage includes home and contents details with costs; travel_coverage includes travel insurance coverage with costs; additional_services are clearly listed with costs; and total_budget provides a complete monthly and annual cost breakdown. All required details are present and complete.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four main components: health_coverage (Balanced Executive Plan9), property_coverage, travel_coverage, and additional_services. 'Balanced Executive Plan9' does not directly appear in the ground-truth ratings, so we must infer which rated plan it most closely aligns with. It includes physical_health, mental_health, stress management, family therapy, psychiatry, preventive care, prescriptions, executive health programs, and pre-existing conditions coverage—all premium-level benefits. This aligns best with the 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' or 'EliteCare Premium Plan' (both rated 10) under primary_health_coverage. The property coverage includes luxury items, jewelry, art, electronics, liability, natural disasters, and temporary accommodation—matching 'EliteHome Premium Coverage' (rating 10). The travel coverage includes medical evacuation, business travel protection, trip cancellation, baggage, accommodation upgrade, travel delay, extended stay, emergency coordination, and English-speaking medical network. This aligns with 'EliteTravel Premium Plan' (rating 10). The additional services include executive liability protection, concierge, dedicated agent, priority claims, telemedicine, global assistance, mobile app, and multilingual support. Telemedicine and concierge services appear under health_enhancement_services and travel_enhancement_services, both rated 10 and 8 respectively. Therefore, the mapped ratings are: Balanced Executive Plan9 → 10, EliteHome Premium Coverage → 10, EliteTravel Premium Plan → 10, Telemedicine Services → 10, Concierge Services → 8.
